assertions.reason: The backend ingestion pipeline is explicitly staged in refreshSnapshot() and broken out into separate pipeline modules for fetching, normalization, enrichment, correlation, persistence, and velocity tracking.
evidence: server/pipeline files: correlateEvents.js, enrichEntities.js, fetchSources.js, index.js, normalizeArticles.js, persistData.js, trackVelocity.js
server/ingest.js lines 457-530 enumerate Stage 1 through Stage 9 in the orchestrator
server/pipeline/correlateEvents.js line 35 handles event correlation as a dedicated module
